options.name: --configPath
options.description:
The path to the configuration file. Defaults to the
config.json in the current working directory.

options.name: --force-restore
options.description:
Force restoring the NuGet dependencies, even if the
lockfile is up-to-date

options.name: --restore-interactive
options.description:
Allow enabling or disabling an interactive mode of "dotnet
restore". Defaults to true

options.name: --skip-restore
options.description:
Prevent the restore operation from running, even if the
lock file is missing or out-of-date

arguments.name: path
arguments.description:
The path to a directory containing a .sln file, a specific 
.sln file, or a specific .csproj file. Defaults to the current working 
directory
